title: anchusa undulata f. subvelutina
intro: Anchusa undulata f. subvelutina, also known as alkanet, is a plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant's root and leaves are rich in anthocyanins, which have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exerting antimicrobial properties. Anchusa undulata f. subvelutina can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its extracts are also used in skincare products and cosmetics.
